issues_fixed.description: Removed spurious 'imagens/' segment from path resolution. Changed path.join(getDataDir(), 'imagens', item.arquivo_path) to path.join(getDataDir(), item.arquivo_path). DB stores arquivo_path as 'images/products/{codigo}/{filename}' so the old join produced {dataDir}/imagens/images/products/{codigo}/{filename} which never existed, causing every batch item to fail with ENOENT. Now matches the correct pattern used in imagens.ts and tipc.ts vision.analisar handler.
issues_fixed.verification: npx tsc --noEmit — clean exit, zero errors
